## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is in Conventional-Commit form with a `component` scope (e.g. `feat(gateway): …`)
- [ ] Linked to a tracking issue/Epic (`Closes #NNN`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]` (or the `no-changelog` label applied)
- [ ] No hand-edited generated artifacts (see ADR-0006) and no secrets in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed
